questions.text: Which statement best describes "Manage Bank Library Master Data"?
options: Creation, update and closing of the affiliate’s own bank accounts in S4
Update of bank database (bank keys) in TIBCO EBX and S4
Managing banks hierarchies and bank fees in S4

questions.text: Which statement about "House Bank Account Management (BAM)" in NEO is true?
options: Bank account opening requests are submitted via email, with an e-mail validation workflow
A dedicated Fiori App exists for “Submitting Bank Accounts applications”, with validation workflow from Zone Treasurer

questions.text: To facilitate automation and review, "Bank pending accounts" should be created per "____"
"Manage and Oversee Banking Relationships" is aimed at managing banks hierarchies and bank fees in S4
Outgoing Payment methods are determined by:
options: Vendor direct debit in order not to issue any payment file

questions.text: Who must approve the setup of direct debit as the payment method for a vendor in the MDM EBX system?
Who is responsible for performing the monthly review of tax codes in purchase orders and invoices (Control LoC1)?
How frequently are bank statements incorporated into the SAP S/4 system?
options: Only when manual adjustments are required
